title: 'You're expected to perform, but no one wants to know how you do it': Cocaine, the toxic fuel of young professionals
subhead: Cocaine at work (1/3). Among young professionals, the illegal and highly addictive drug is used in a relentless pursuit of performance, often shrouded in taboo and without questioning of working conditions.

subhead: Confusing a region's geographic exposure with its vulnerability to climate change can create a false sense of security and increase the unpreparedness of local authorities and residents, warn analysts Clément Jeanneau and Antoine Poincaré.

title: How live screenings of Paris Fashion Week are making fashion more accessible
subhead: Organized by influencer Lyas, free live screenings of fashion shows on big screens toured France during Paris Men's Fashion Week. Several hundred people gathered in Marseille for the opening night.

title: Tiago Rodrigues, director of the Avignon Festival: 'Thanks to Europe, thanks to democracy, how lucky I have been!'
